title: ilex myricoides var. polyphylla
intro: Ilex myricoides var. polyphylla, also known as the 'Guayabillo', is a variety of shrub or small tree that belongs to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex myricoides var. polyphylla are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Guayabillo plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
